{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200007138F81BBFFFF8FDA59ED"}"},"total":3630},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7438683263294833433","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错，作者的文章干货满满，又让我学到了很多知识，我原本以为我看的历史类小说不下百部，已经没有是我不知道的了，看了作者的书我才感觉我是孤陋寡闻了[捂脸][捂脸][捂脸]   所以必须五星好评！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731968991,"group_id":"7403604579402648600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生命只是一个过客，完美与否都是人生感悟，终究要回到你来的世界","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N67pYWLDOTiAsy/2TcnSN3ubu8rOrdoXc6CifL08NB06","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e8d8d3a7cea54917a8b0b1ba112df86c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796538&x-signature=GOiTS2SME9sqPd5KXNtIZzVsCho%3D","user_id":"2312981201563774","user_name":"看(kan)破"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2312981201563774","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7403604579402648600","book_info":{"abstract":"【历史盘点】+【平民史观】+【弹幕剧透】+【皇帝们整活】+【从殷商开始一口气看完炎黄历史】

陈勇接到了一个盘点历史人物的工作，心想着从殷商开始盘点。

为了区别于很多盘点视频，他决定采取标准史学流程。

史料的优先级：考古文物>官修正史>私人修史>野史！

观点采信：现代学者>古代史官！

历史观使用：平民史观>英雄史观！　　

并且，分为了几个维度给皇帝们多维度打分，爱民如子采用平民史观，直接让皇帝们破防了。

人人痛骂商纣王，等殷商懈怠祭祀的真相一出，解密了人参果的内幕，皇帝们齐齐闭嘴。

大周的文王那么贤德，奴隶为什么要大规模的逃亡他国，这是道德的沦丧，还是礼法的缺失。

殷商制度VS大周制度，到底谁才是文明，谁才是野蛮。

秦朝百姓VS其他王朝百姓，哪个过得更惨。

隋炀帝征高句丽VS李世民征高句丽，百姓们怎么评价。

当结果公布的时候，皇帝们集体破防。

弹幕中狂发：历史不忍细看。

盘点完的小剧场会有各种名场面。
李承乾：请陛下称太子！
朱高燧：朱棣，你狂妄！
孔子：要以德服人，我忍不了这孙子了，取我的斧子来。
秦二世：阿父，咱家要进行计划生育了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a720f659d81d675fb2ec9b8677858f14","author":"练习生001","author_id":"","book_id":"7403604579402648600","book_name":"正史比野史还野，李世民崩溃","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#184060","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":73,"name":"大唐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=73&name=大唐&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":126,"name":"明朝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=126&name=明朝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7403604638693327384","read_count":"80413","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3176203"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"882","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,大唐,明朝,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/92304a81e11d5efe012bf471d4313f68~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451207&x-signature=eU47QxOr2BC4PzeeU8vI%2Bp2pWsc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"99143108957","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"54"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200007138F81BBFFFF8FDA59ED"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":54,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16838,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19642,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":32916},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1732003095,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7459392005605737240","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好书，希望作者能一直写到民国，慢慢来写千万别急、别跳朝代。看到好多人说作者瞎扯打低分的，我想说的是你们可以把作者这本书当三国演义来看，你们自己看看对比三国演义和三国志的离谱程度，作者推理合理多了[捂脸]。正史记载上商朝、周朝和各方势力，傻子打架似的还各种各样地方割裂感，我更喜欢这种阴谋阳谋权谋的争斗，感觉更加真实一些。这本来就是一本小说啊，而且里面还有不少干货。希望书不要进小黑屋，祝作者数据越来越好。[顶帖][顶帖][顶帖]","text_exts":[{"e":64,"s":60,"text":"三国演义","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E6%BC%94%E4%B9%89&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742672078FDA59ED%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227459392005605737240%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227403604579402648600%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E6%BC%94%E4%B9%89%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":83,"s":80,"text":"三国志","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E5%BF%97&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742672078FDA59ED%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227459392005605737240%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227403604579402648600%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%89%E5%9B%BD%E5%BF%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736778394,"group_id":"7403604579402648600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxU9jGQ3Pe1cuJ6SM6IBLA5r15RKR+IwJWuN0R37
